message:
test(engine): add interop parity tests for default export and star re-export scenarios

Two new tests verifying that known ESM/CJS interop specimens resolve
correctly with no remediation required:

- default_export_esm_to_cjs: asserts Success outcome, Pass verdict,
  Supported disposition, single passing binding verdict, and
  no_remediation_required guidance code
- star_re_export_across_boundary: same assertions with linked_count=3
  and two passing binding verdicts, confirming star re-exports cross
  module boundaries without needing compatibility shims

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
